title: Harbor Evidence Package Layout
description: Documents the on-disk layout of an unpacked Harbor evidence package. This schema is descriptive (used by docs/tests); the archive itself is a tar.zst.

collection_log.description: Structured JSON-lines log of the collector run.

sources.description: sources/<name>/ — one directory per logical source.

events.description: events.jsonl.zst — normalized JSON Lines for the source.

meta.description: _meta.json — time window, region list, record count, sha256.

errors.description: errors/<source>.log — partial failures and AccessDenied detail.
